description_long: This object is a single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the lower portion of the fuselage, with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral angles. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is deployed, consisting of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The cockpit is positioned at the forward section of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a canopy integrated into the upper fuselage. The entire surface is a uniform light gray, with no visible markings or color variations.
description: A streamlined, single-propeller airplane with a low-wing, conventional tail, and taildragger landing gear, finished in uniform light gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the propeller, low-mounted straight wing, and taildragger landing gear with the cockpit canopy visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, symmetrical wing span, and the main landing gear under each wing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the taildragger gear, straight wing, and the rear fuselage profile.
description_view_3: Head-on view emphasizing the propeller, cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan with landing gear deployed.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the upper fuselage, likely single-seat.
